models.name: claude-sonnet-5
models.description: Claude Sonnet 5. Latest Sonnet — strong all-rounder with improved reasoning and coding over 4.6.

models.name: gpt-5.4
models.description: GPT-5.4. Strong flagship GPT model for harder reasoning, planning, and coding tasks through GitHub Copilot.

models.name: gpt-5.4-mini
models.description: GPT-5.4 Mini. Faster, lighter-weight GPT option for everyday chat, drafting, and cheaper iteration.

models.name: claude-opus-4.8
models.description: Claude Opus 4.8. Most capable Claude option for the hardest analysis and reasoning tasks through GitHub Copilot.

models.name: gpt-5.6-sol
models.description: GPT-5.6 Sol via GitHub Copilot. High-capability GPT-5.6 variant for advanced reasoning and coding; ~1M-token context.

models.name: gpt-5.6-luna
models.description: GPT-5.6 Luna via GitHub Copilot. High-capability GPT-5.6 variant for advanced reasoning and coding; ~1M-token context.

models.name: gpt-5.6-terra
models.description: GPT-5.6 Terra via GitHub Copilot. High-capability GPT-5.6 variant for advanced reasoning and coding; ~1M-token context.

models.name: claude-opus-4-6
models.description: Claude Opus 4.6 (direct Anthropic). Most capable. Deep reasoning, complex multi-step tasks.

models.name: claude-sonnet-4-6
models.description: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (direct Anthropic). Fast, capable all-rounder.

models.name: gpt-5.4
models.description: GPT-5.4 via Azure AI Foundry. High reasoning effort, advanced multi-turn and coding tasks. Deployment must be created on the Foundry account (deploy/envs/local/<env>/foundry-deployments.json).

models.name: gpt-5.4-mini
models.description: GPT-5.4 Mini via Azure AI Foundry. Faster and cheaper than full GPT-5.4. Deployment must be created on the Foundry account.

models.name: gpt-5.4-nano
models.description: GPT-5.4 Nano via Azure AI Foundry. Lightweight, fast, cost-efficient for simpler tasks. Deployment must be created on the Foundry account.

models.name: Kimi-K2.5
models.description: Kimi-K2.5 (Moonshot AI) via Azure AI Foundry. Strong reasoning. Note: known multi-worker session-state failures; avoid for that scenario.
